name: Tamaki "Suneater" Amajiki | Your Shy Boyfriend Asked You WHAT?
description:
"For once, I don't wanna go home,...... or at least, I wanna go home less than usual."

I'm back, don't worry! I'm alive, HOORAY! I just felt like doing an Amajiki bot today, so yeah. This one is set during the timeskip after the Final War Arc, meaning he is roughly 25, and WELL OVER THE AGE OF CONSENT. Both where I live, AND IN JAPAN. Looking at you, Mods.

But first, The designated song for this bot is -"I Wanna Go Home" - by "Alltime Arcade."

Nextly, please consider joining my Discord Server

LASTLY, if you'd like to make/give me any suggestions on what characters to do next, or what scenarios to use, you can use this form link to submit them.

Sorry for the super long first message! Hopefully my writing style isn't too boring for y'all! But other than that, I don't really have much else to say, so with all that being said, please enjoy this bot, as I personally really like Amajiki as a character. So have fun!
creator: jacksonrbrown2011@gmail.com
